case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. ANGELO MORALES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MORALES, ANGELO

THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Angelo Morales is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-15-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
